name: Plant Watering Vacation Buddy Note
description: Builds a room-by-room vacation plant sitter handoff note with water amounts, timing, photo slots, visit checklist, and skip-if-unsure instructions without toxicity claims or invented plant care.
use_cases: Create a sitter-ready watering note before travel.
Organize plants by room with exact owner-provided water amounts.
Add photo slots and skip-if-unsure rules for quick handoff.
safety_notes: Sitter handoff only, not plant diagnosis or long-term horticulture planning.
No toxic plant claims or safety claims about pets, children, or people.
Do not invent plant species, care needs, water amounts, light needs, or pest treatments.
Use skip-if-unsure instructions whenever details are unclear.
